data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bensont reiterates Fed's September rate cut was too big
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bensont reiterated that the Fed's interest rate cut in September was too large, and pointed out that the Fed is reducing its holdings of U.S. debt (Jinshi).

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Criticizes Federal Reserve's September Rate Cut
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent has reiterated concerns that the Federal Reserve's interest rate cut in September was excessively large. Additionally, he noted that the Federal Reserve is currently reducing its holdings of U.S. Treasury securities.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF demand dips; Should bulls worry now?
data.description:
Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) demand are slowing down, and this is reflected in the daily flow charts. Despite the recent drawdown, bulls don’t need to panic just yet as the bull run is expected to continue unless ETF outflows take full control. The leading crypto is now down by 5% over the past 30 days. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-etf-demand-dips-should-bulls-worry/

data.title: Bitcoin edges higher as investors digest Fed’s inflation concerns
data.description:
Bitcoin has posted slight gains over the past 24 hours as investors digest the Fed’s cautious stance on inflation and interest rate policy.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342375/bitcoin-edges-higher-as-investors-digest-feds-inflation-concerns?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: UniSat: Programmable modules will be introduced for the mainnet BRC20 protocol in Q3 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News UniSat published a statement on the X platform stating that it will carry out a major protocol upgrade for BRC-20 in 2025. This upgrade introduces three modules: one-step transfer, exchange module, and programmable module.
One-step transfer will be launched on the Fractal mainnet in the first quarter of 2025 and deployed to the Bitcoin mainnet in the second quarter of 2025.
The exchange module roadmap will be released in the first quarter of 2025, experimented on the testnet in the second quarter of 2025, and then launched on the Bitcoin mainnet.
The programmable module deployment will be tested on the testnet in the first quarter of 2025 and launched on the Bitcoin mainnet in the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Wintermute is the market maker for KAITO
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Wintermute is the market maker of KAITO. 3 hours ago, Wintermute received 1.2 million market-making tokens (accounting for 0.5% of the initial circulation) from the multi-signature address of the project party, and 400,000 tokens have been recharged into the exchange.

data.title: Elon Musk's xAI Grok App Tops U.S. App Store Free App Rankings
data.description: According to PANews, Elon Musk's AI company xAI has seen its Grok app rise to the top of the U.S. App Store's free app rankings, surpassing ChatGPT. This development highlights the growing popularity and competitive edge of xAI's offerings in the artificial intelligence sector.

data.title: Canary Capital Launches AXL Trust for Institutional Investors
data.description: According to PANews, Canary Capital, a digital asset investment firm, has announced the launch of the Canary AXL Trust. This new investment channel is designed for institutional and qualified investors seeking direct investment in AXL. Currently, the trust is exclusively available to qualified investors interested in AXL, which supports decentralized security through a scalable blockchain interoperability network.

data.title: OSL: Security is the "rigid ticket" for institutional entry, and high-net-worth clients tend to store BTC in compliant exchanges or crypto ETFs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: At the panel discussion on Bitcoin institutional infrastructure at Event: Bitcoin Tech Carnival 2025, OSL Chief Institutional Business Officer (CIBO) Zhang Yinghua said that when the market value of Bitcoin exceeds 2 trillion US dollars, security is no longer a cost item, but a "rigid ticket" for institutional entry. At present, institutions and high-net-worth clients attach great importance to security. They prefer to store BTC in compliant exchanges such as OSL, or choose to invest in BTC ETFs to avoid the risk of wallet loss or asset theft.
Zhang Yinghua emphasized that OSL also reconstructs the "institutional-level security" standard through a triple defense system - physical isolation mechanism of hot and cold wallets, real-time on-chain abnormality monitoring system and SFC licensed audit endorsement, to serve the logic of institutional increase in volume of "preferring to sacrifice part of the income to avoid the risk of naked running on the chain".
